name: 变换
subject: math
curriculum_points: Describe the effect of translations, rotations, reflections, and dilations on two-dimensional figures using coordinates, preserving congruence or similarity as appropriate.
Given a geometric figure, perform a sequence of transformations and describe a sequence that exhibits the congruence or similarity between two figures.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
